# Protobuf Message Types

These are auto-generated protobuf message types from Valve's game definitions.
They are used with the [NetMessages](../networking) system for sending and hooking network messages.

Each message type has standard protobuf accessors (`Has*`, `Clear*`, field number constants)
following [Google.Protobuf](https://protobuf.dev/reference/csharp/api-docs/) conventions.

## Other Messages

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `NetworkbasetypesExtensions` | Holder for extension identifiers generated from the top level of networkbasetypes.proto |
| `NetworkConnectionExtensions` | Holder for extension identifiers generated from the top level of network_connection.proto |
| `ResponseTypeOneofCase` | Enum of possible cases for the "ResponseType" oneof. |
| `SteammessagesExtensions` | Holder for extension identifiers generated from the top level of steammessages.proto |
| `SteammessagesUnifiedBaseSteamworkssdkExtensions` | Holder for extension identifiers generated from the top level of steammessages_unified_base.steamworkssdk.proto |
| `ValveextensionsExtensions` | Holder for extension identifiers generated from the top level of valveextensions.proto |
